name: Cocoa Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 Cake Compressed Yeast OR 1 Cake Dry Yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, dissolve yeast in 1 tablespoon sugar and lukewarm milk. Stir until smooth.
2. Gradually add 3 cups flour and beat with an electric mixer until the batter is homogeneous.
3. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
4. In another bowl, cream together shortening and 1/2 cup sugar. Beat in eggs one at a time.
5. Add cocoa powder, salt, and remaining flour (or enough to form a soft dough) to the batter mixture.
6. Mix until well combined.
7. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently for about 3 minutes.
8. Place dough into oiled bread pans that are 1/2 full.
9. Cover and let rise again until doubled in size, about 30 minutes.
10. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
11. Bake loaves for 40-50 minutes or until golden brown and sound hollow when tapped on the bottom.
12. Remove from pans and cool on wire racks.
